goal: Ensure every dependency has explicit strategic requirements tied to dominating all operating categories.

@octokit/rest.value_hypothesis: Enables secure GitHub automation that keeps every category continuously upgraded.
strategic_requirements: Must support authenticated workflow and pull-request automation.
Must support robust retry/error handling for API rate limits and failures.

@vitejs/plugin-react.value_hypothesis: Accelerates reliable frontend delivery for category dashboards and control surfaces.
strategic_requirements: Must preserve fast build feedback for UI iteration.
Must keep React compilation standards aligned with Vite releases.

autoprefixer.value_hypothesis: Maintains cross-browser presentation quality for all category-facing interfaces.
strategic_requirements: Must automatically cover modern browser compatibility targets.
Must be integrated with existing CSS build pipelines.

cheerio.value_hypothesis: Supports scalable market and competitor content extraction for strategic intelligence.
strategic_requirements: Must provide deterministic HTML parsing for ingestion workflows.
Must be constrained to compliant scraping and approved sources.

cors.value_hypothesis: Enables secure cross-origin access for multi-surface category products.
strategic_requirements: Must enforce explicit origin policy controls.
Must prevent permissive defaults in production.

cryptography.value_hypothesis: Protects sensitive operational and customer data across every category.
strategic_requirements: Must keep encryption primitives on supported secure versions.
Must be used for data-at-rest or transport security controls where required.

dotenv.value_hypothesis: Standardizes environment-based configuration for portable category deployments.
strategic_requirements: Must centralize non-secret config loading without hardcoded credentials.
Must remain compatible with CI/CD and local development workflows.

eslint.value_hypothesis: Prevents JavaScript defects that slow expansion across categories.
strategic_requirements: Must enforce zero-warning lint quality gates in CI.
Must remain aligned with repository JS style rules.

express.value_hypothesis: Provides scalable API foundations for category orchestration and monetization flows.
strategic_requirements: Must support stable routing and middleware composition.
Must keep security updates current to reduce exploit risk.

express-rate-limit.value_hypothesis: Protects core APIs against abuse that can disrupt category operations.
strategic_requirements: Must apply route-level protection to sensitive endpoints.
Must expose configurable thresholds for operational tuning.

fastapi.value_hypothesis: Delivers high-performance Python APIs for rapid category feature rollout.
strategic_requirements: Must maintain async performance for concurrent workloads.
Must keep compatibility with current HTTP client and framework stack.

flask.value_hypothesis: Supports lightweight service endpoints used in category-specific bots.
strategic_requirements: Must keep extension compatibility and security patch levels current.
Must avoid architecture drift from standardized API patterns.

flask-cors.value_hypothesis: Enables safe browser-to-service connectivity for category dashboards.
strategic_requirements: Must enforce explicit allowlist origins.
Must avoid wildcard CORS in production contexts.

httpx.value_hypothesis: Improves resilient API integrations for external category data sources.
strategic_requirements: Must support timeout and retry-aware usage patterns.
Must be preferred for async integrations where throughput matters.

jest.value_hypothesis: Guards JavaScript behavior so category features scale without regressions.
strategic_requirements: Must execute repository JS tests in CI for each dependency-impacting change.
Must keep test runtime stable for quick feedback.

jinja2.value_hypothesis: Supports dynamic content generation for category workflows and reporting.
strategic_requirements: Must enforce safe templating practices to prevent injection issues.
Must remain compatible with current Python runtime and framework usage.

json2csv.value_hypothesis: Enables exportable analytics artifacts for category-level decision making.
strategic_requirements: Must produce deterministic, schema-consistent exports.
Must support large dataset conversion without data loss.

node-fetch.value_hypothesis: Supports external service integrations for Node-based category automation.
strategic_requirements: Must enforce timeout/error handling wrappers in production paths.
Must remain on maintained versions for security and protocol support.

nodemon.value_hypothesis: Speeds local iteration cycles that accelerate category delivery.
strategic_requirements: Must remain dev-only and never required in production runtime.
Must preserve stable watch/restart behavior for backend development.

openai.value_hypothesis: Powers AI-driven differentiation across all category bots and assistants.
strategic_requirements: Must be wired through governance controls and usage limits.
Must support prompt/response auditing for quality and compliance.

pdfminer.six.value_hypothesis: Extracts high-value document intelligence for category automation workflows.
strategic_requirements: Must parse target document formats with stable accuracy.
Must include failure handling for malformed or encrypted PDFs.

postcss.value_hypothesis: Enables scalable style processing for multi-category frontend surfaces.
strategic_requirements: Must integrate with Tailwind and autoprefixer pipelines.
Must keep build performance acceptable for CI.

prettier.value_hypothesis: Maintains consistent code formatting to reduce review friction at scale.
strategic_requirements: Must remain the canonical formatter for JS/CSS/JSON/MD assets.
Must be runnable in automated checks and local workflows.

pytest.value_hypothesis: Provides foundational quality assurance for Python category bots.
strategic_requirements: Must run core test suites in CI for dependency-impacting changes.
Must keep compatibility with plugin stack and Python version policy.

pytest-benchmark.value_hypothesis: Tracks performance regressions that can slow category execution at scale.
strategic_requirements: Must provide repeatable benchmark runs for critical workflows.
Must be used to detect material latency regressions before release.

pytest-cov.value_hypothesis: Measures test coverage to sustain quality while expanding category footprint.
strategic_requirements: Must report meaningful coverage data in CI contexts.
Must not be bypassed for high-risk integration changes.

python-docx.value_hypothesis: Enables structured report generation for category client deliverables.
strategic_requirements: Must preserve document fidelity for exported artifacts.
Must support templated generation workflows.

python-dotenv.value_hypothesis: Standardizes Python environment configuration across category services.
strategic_requirements: Must keep secrets out of source and loaded from environment.
Must remain compatible with local, CI, and deployment runtimes.

react.value_hypothesis: Powers interactive experiences for control tower and category product surfaces.
strategic_requirements: Must maintain compatibility with current frontend architecture.
Must prioritize performance and accessibility for operational dashboards.

react-dom.value_hypothesis: Ensures reliable rendering for category-facing React interfaces.
strategic_requirements: Must stay version-aligned with React core.
Must support stable hydration/render behavior for production UIs.

recharts.value_hypothesis: Delivers operational analytics visibility for category performance decisions.
strategic_requirements: Must support clear KPI visualization for leadership workflows.
Must avoid heavy chart configurations that degrade dashboard responsiveness.

requests.value_hypothesis: Enables robust external integrations and market-data retrieval across categories.
strategic_requirements: Must use safe timeout/retry defaults in bot integrations.
Must remain on secure, supported versions.

schedule.value_hypothesis: Supports recurring automation tasks required for category dominance operations.
strategic_requirements: Must provide deterministic trigger behavior for periodic jobs.
Must include monitoring hooks for missed or failed schedules.

selenium.value_hypothesis: Automates browser workflows to capture opportunities in multiple categories.
strategic_requirements: Must be restricted to approved and compliant automation use cases.
Must include robust wait/retry logic to reduce flaky execution.

stripe.value_hypothesis: Enables monetization workflows that convert category performance into revenue.
strategic_requirements: Must support secure payment operations with strict key handling.
Must be configured for auditable transaction and webhook flows.

supertest.value_hypothesis: Validates API contract integrity for category-critical backend services.
strategic_requirements: Must cover core endpoint behavior in automated tests.
Must prevent unnoticed breaking API changes.

tailwindcss.value_hypothesis: Accelerates consistent UI development across category experiences.
strategic_requirements: Must enforce shared design tokens and utility conventions.
Must integrate cleanly with existing build tooling.

uuid.value_hypothesis: Provides reliable unique identifiers for cross-category workflows and records.
strategic_requirements: Must generate collision-resistant IDs for distributed processes.
Must be used consistently where stable identity is required.

vite.value_hypothesis: Enables fast frontend build pipelines for rapid category iteration.
strategic_requirements: Must keep dev and production builds stable and reproducible.
Must preserve short feedback loops for UI teams.

webdriver-manager.value_hypothesis: Keeps browser automation infrastructure stable for Selenium-driven workflows.
strategic_requirements: Must maintain compatible driver versions for CI and local runs.
Must minimize automation downtime from driver mismatch.
